overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring high-speed travel on rain-soaked highways at night. The player navigates through foggy conditions with neon-lit cyberpunk aesthetics, transitioning from enclosed elevated roadways to open desert highways and finally approaching commercial districts with bright digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with concrete barriers and metal fencing

events.description: vehicle accelerates from 50 km/h to 70 km/h along the rain-slicked highway
passing under overhead highway structure causing brief shadow occlusion

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on elevated highway during heavy rainstorm, maintaining central lane position

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle traveling in same direction with red tail lights visible through fog

entered.detail: tall concrete safety barrier with vertical metal fencing on top running along right side
metal safety fencing mounted on top of concrete barrier
elevated highway overpass structure with support columns visible ahead
tall highway lighting pole with double lamps illuminating the road

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated highway enclosed by concrete barriers and metal fencing during a heavy rainstorm. The vehicle accelerates along the wet asphalt, passing under overhead structures while street lights pierce through the foggy darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway transition with guardrails and desert terrain visible

events.description: exits enclosed elevated section to open highway with metal guardrails replacing concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: continuing at high speed through highway transition zone, navigating gentle curves

entered.detail: silver metal highway guardrail replacing the concrete barrier
green highway exit sign with white text indicating directions
arid desert landscape with sparse vegetation visible beyond the guardrail
concrete highway overpass spanning across the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The highway opens up as concrete barriers give way to metal guardrails, revealing desert terrain beyond. The vehicle continues at high speed through this transition zone, passing under overpasses while rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert highway with large digital billboards

events.description: passing large digital billboards and the Jackson Plains road sign
vehicle accelerates to maximum speed exceeding 100 km/h on straight open highway

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on open desert highway, passing large digital advertisements and road signs

entered.detail: roadside sign indicating Jackson Plains location
large illuminated digital billboard displaying advertisements
tall digital display screen showing colorful imagery
commercial advertisement billboard with bright lighting

segments.scene_description: The vehicle speeds along an open desert highway flanked by metal guardrails, passing large digital billboards and the Jackson Plains sign. The speedometer climbs past 100 km/h as the landscape opens up to reveal distant rock formations and sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial highway with neon signs and gas stations

events.description: entering commercial district with bright neon signage and gas station structures

agents.ego_description: driving through commercial area with bright neon signs and gas stations, maintaining high speed

entered.detail: illuminated gas station with pumps and canopy visible on the right side
bright neon signs on commercial buildings including a prominent CHOICE sign
row of commercial buildings with illuminated windows and signage
overhead canopy structure of the gas station with bright lighting

segments.scene_description: The highway enters a commercial zone where desert landscape gives way to gas stations and neon-lit storefronts. Bright digital billboards and illuminated signs line the road as the vehicle continues through this developed area, passing a gas station on the right with prominent neon signage on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive that transitions from a claustrophobic, enclosed highway into an expansive desert landscape under a heavy rainstorm. It begins with the vehicle accelerating along wet asphalt, hemmed in by concrete barriers and metal fencing while street lights pierce through the foggy darkness. As the car surges forward under overhead structures, the oppressive concrete walls gradually give way to open metal guardrails. The scene then expands to reveal a vast desert terrain beyond the roadside, with the vehicle maintaining its velocity as it passes under distant overpasses while the rain continues to fall.

The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive that transforms from a desolate desert expanse into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial corridor. It begins with the vehicle accelerating past 100 km/h along an open highway, passing the Jackson Plains sign and metal guardrails against a backdrop of distant rock formations and sparse vegetation. As the road progresses, the natural landscape gradually recedes to make way for the first signs of urban development. The scene then shifts into a commercial zone where the desert terrain is replaced by gas stations and illuminated storefronts. Finally, the environment becomes fully saturated with light as the camera speeds past bright digital billboards and prominent neon signage lining the roadside.
